reply_original: Hi! Thank you for your feedback. We are constantly working to improve our AI's realism and emotional depth. To help us understand which parts felt lacking, please share your specific suggestions or examples with us at support@fantachat.ai. Your input helps us evolve! We hope to provide a more immersive experience for you soon.
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的反馈。我们正致力于不断提升 AI 的真实感和情感深度。为了帮助我们了解哪些部分尚显不足，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的具体建议或案例。您的意见将助力我们的成长！希望很快能为您带来更具沉浸感的体验。
